steps.t: A freshly baked pie can be found in Lyndelby. You should deliver the pie to Madelgard Túcca.
A freshly baked pie can be found in Lyndelby. You should deliver the pie to Ogiva Túcca.
A freshly baked pie can be found in Lyndelby. You should deliver the pie to Erma Túcca.
Gísla Bolga can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Gísla Bolga.
